headline: Chinese AI Levels Up, Intensifying Competition
detail: New Chinese AI models mean more competition for US tech giants, especially in AI/chips. This could pressure sentiment and future growth for your concentrated tech holdings.
rec: No action, but monitor how US tech/chip names react to this competitive pressure.

headline: Semiconductors Struggle as Broader Market Finds Health
detail: This directly impacts your heavily concentrated semiconductor holdings (SMH, SOXL). Your core sector is underperforming while the broader market is healthy, a significant concern on margin.
rec: Consider trimming struggling semiconductor positions like SMH. The scanner has SOXS (inverse semiconductor ETF) as a WATCH; if you expect continued weakness, consider SOXS entry 52.77-52.27, stop 51.07.

headline: Many Tech Stocks Down 25%+ in July
detail: This highlights the current drawdown in tech, where 90% of your capital is. Your leveraged positions (SOXL, SPAL) are already showing massive losses, amplifying this sector-wide trend.
rec: Re-evaluate your exposure to highly volatile or leveraged tech names, especially SOXL (-46.77%) and SPAL (-47.83%). Ensure your stops are appropriate for current prices.
